lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic imperfections. The interior is clean with light signs of use on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine is reliable and has been regularly maintained. The exterior has a few minor scratches, and the interior shows light signs of use. All mechanical components are in working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The engine runs poorly with a significant knock, the transmission slips consistently, and there are multiple fluid leaks throughout. The body has extensive rust and significant paint damage, while the interior shows heavy wear and tear. It is currently not in roadworthy condition and will require towing.

Get ready to hit the road in this solid and dependable vehicle! It has been well-loved and shows some honest character with typical wear and tear for its age, but it remains a reliable driver that's ready for its next adventure. With a little bit of cosmetic attention, this car will truly shine. It's a fantastic opportunity to own a great model that is functional, fun, and priced to move!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The exterior shows its age with noticeable rust on the wheel wells, several large dents on the passenger side, and significant paint fading on the roof and hood. Inside, the interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery and non-functional air conditioning. Mechanically, the car starts but has a persistent oil leak and a rough idle; the check engine light is on, and the brakes are nearing the end of their life. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.
Fair condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in a state that defies its tenure. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of maintenance consistent with a showroom environment. Mechanically beyond reproach and aesthetically immaculate, this offering is tailored for the discerning buyer who demands an uncompromising level of quality and a peerless driving experience.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It's in absolutely pristine condition—basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that looks and feels brand new, this is the one for you. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!
This collector-grade E46 M3 features a meticulously maintained S54 power plant with a perfectly synchronized VANOS system and pristine individual throttle bodies
Used car. Mint condition. Garage-kept. Zero accidents. Original paint. Clean title.

This 2017 Porsche 718 Cayman is a true collector-grade specimen, maintained with obsessive attention to detail. Finished in a flawless Guards Red with a professionally applied multi-layer ceramic coating, the exterior shows zero rock chips, swirls, or imperfections. The cabin remains in showroom condition, featuring Black leather sport seats with crisp stitching and absolutely no bolster wear; it has been kept exclusively in a climate-controlled garage, strictly smoke-free and pet-free. Mechanically, it is impeccable; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at an authorized Porsche center, with a comprehensive binder of maintenance records and both original keys included. With exceptionally low mileage, the engine and PDK transmission operate with surgical precision. This is a rare opportunity to own a pristine, investment-quality machine that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom-pristine condition, having been meticulously preserved to the highest standards of excellence. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects a rigorous commitment to maintenance. We invite the discerning buyer to experience a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market, offering the aesthetics and performance of a new machine.

Presented here is an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-ready condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and absolute mechanical integrity. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless caliber and provenance.

Hey there! I’m so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It has been pampered since day one and is sparkling clean inside and out. You’re going to love how it drives—it's smooth, quiet, and feels practically brand new. If you're looking for a ride that's in truly pristine condition, this is the one for you. Come take a look and fall in love!

Offering a pristine E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54B32 power plant with independent throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. This collector-grade example has undergone a comprehensive rod bearing service and subframe reinforcement to ensure structural and mechanical integrity. The powertrain is mated to a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a limited-slip differential, delivering linear power to the rear wheels. Suspended on Bilstein PSS10 adjustable dampers, the chassis dynamics are sharp and communicative. The factory finish remains in concours condition with no discernible swirl marks or paint depth inconsistencies. This is
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Complete service history. Inspection ready.

This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that presents as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been meticulously maintained with a multi-stage ceramic coating, the exterior is absolutely flawless—free from rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather seats retain their original matte finish and factory-fresh scent, with absolutely no wear on the bolsters or touchpoints. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond

Presented here is a superlative example of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle reflects a level of care that borders on the fastidious, presenting in a state that defies its previous ownership. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this motorcar represents an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the designation of mint condition. Every facet of this vehicle—from its pristine exterior finish to its flawlessly preserved interior—reflects a legacy of meticulous care and mechanical excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality, offering the discerning driver an experience indistinguishable from a showroom-floor acquisition.

Hey there! You've got to check out this absolute gem! I have babied this car since day one, and it is honestly in pristine, showroom-level condition. It looks and drives like it's brand new—not a single blemish to be found. I'm looking for a great new home for it where it'll be just as loved. It's a total dream to drive, and I'm sure you'll fall in love the moment you see it!
This E46 M3 represents a turn-key example of the legendary S54 platform. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws.

This exceptional vehicle is a true time capsule, maintained to the highest possible standards and presenting in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no scratches, dings, or swirl marks, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no bolster wear, and all interior plastics and wood trim retain their original luster. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance and always stored in a climate-controlled garage. With exceptionally low mileage and a spotless undercarriage, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in peerless condition, exhibiting virtually no signs of wear. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our stringent criteria for mechanical and aesthetic perfection. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than showroom quality, this vehicle stands as a definitive benchmark of its class.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque. Performance is flawless, and the aesthetic presentation is beyond reproach.

Hey there! 👋 You have seriously got to see this absolute beauty. It is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it feels just like it rolled right off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new but without that hefty new-car price tag, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin and fall in love! ✨

Presented is a pristine E46 M3, a definitive example of high-revving atmospheric engineering. At its heart lies the S54B32 inline-six, featuring six individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing, delivering a linear power band up to an 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen features a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with an M Variable Differential Lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis has been meticulously preserved, including proactive subframe reinforcement to maintain structural rigidity. Performance is sharpened by a Bilstein PSS10 coilover system, reducing unsprung weight and optimizing roll center geometry. With a documented history of valve clearances and rod bearing services, this investment-grade vehicle offers unparalleled mechanical transparency and peak longitudinal dynamics.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless exterior and interior. Full service history included.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained with obsessive care and presented in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, having been professionally ceramic coated and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains indistinguishable from the day it left the factory; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creasing, while the high-tech dashboard and controls function perfectly with no visible wear. Mechanically, the car is impeccable, boasting a complete service history from authorized dealerships and incredibly low mileage. Every component, from the engine's smooth power delivery to the crisp shifts of the transmission, reflects its pristine status. This is a rare opportunity to own a flawless example of automotive excellence

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an exacting standard that rivals its original showroom state. This vehicle boasts a flawless exterior profile and an interior of uncompromising quality, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically superior and aesthetically peerless, it offers a driving experience that satisfies the most rigorous professional standards.
